statement: In every magma, Equation 1739 (`x = (y * y) * ((z * x) * y)`) implies Equation 3888 (`x * x = (y * (y * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0476
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op z x) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op y (op y x)) y)
